overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban downtown. The player moves from under a massive concrete overpass past a towering glass skyscraper, along a multi-lane road with light traffic, and onto a sidewalk approaching a distant bridge structure. Bright midday sun illuminates the scene with strong shadows and a warm color tone.

scene_state.functional_zone: under elevated highway with view of mega-corporation tower

events.description: camera begins moving forward from initial stationary position under the overpass
moving out from under overpass into open street area with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking forward from under the overpass while observing the massive glass tower and surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating partial cover overhead
towering futuristic skyscraper with glass and steel facade dominating the skyline
large white satellite dishes mounted on a distant building
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying pink and red graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass with a view of a towering glass skyscraper in the distance. The camera moves forward from a stationary position, emerging from the sheltered area into open street. Sparse vehicle traffic passes by as the mega-structure of the overpass frames the view of the futuristic city architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level alongside mega-tower with vehicle traffic

events.description: futuristic armored vehicle passes by on the right side of the frame
moving from street level onto sidewalk beside concrete retaining wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street as various vehicles pass by, with the massive tower dominating the left side of view

notable_agents.action: large futuristic armored truck driving past the camera on the right
tan off-road vehicle driving along the street in the same direction

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying a portrait of a man with text overlay
tall poles with orange illuminated lights lining the street
tall concrete wall running parallel to the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open street with the massive glass tower now on the left, the scene features moderate vehicle traffic including an armored truck passing by. The camera transitions from the street onto a sidewalk beside a concrete retaining wall, passing under the remaining section of the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk beside highway with railings

events.description: camera turns slightly to follow the curve of the sidewalk path

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated sidewalk next to a concrete retaining wall, passing street lamps and green metal railings

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: green painted metal safety railing along the edge of the sidewalk
large overhead gantry with directional signs and symbols
large curved bridge structure visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The segment follows a curved elevated sidewalk bordered by a concrete retaining wall on the right and green railings on the left. The massive tower has passed out of view, and the focus shifts to the street furniture including orange street lamps and an approaching overhead traffic sign gantry.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching highway intersection with overhead signage

events.description: approaching the distant bridge arch structure now visible ahead
multiple flying vehicles visible hovering in the sky ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk approaching a large overhead traffic sign and distant bridge structure, with flying vehicles visible overhead

notable_agents.action: flying vehicles hovering in the distance above the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a major intersection marked by large overhead traffic signage. The distant bridge arch becomes more prominent as the camera advances, and futuristic flying vehicles are visible in the sky above. The concrete retaining wall recedes into the distance as the path continues toward the bridge structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the sheltered shadows of a concrete overpass into a bright, expansive urban thoroughfare. It begins by emerging from beneath the massive overpass structure, moving forward as a towering glass skyscraper comes into view amidst sparse vehicle traffic. As the camera transitions from the open street onto a sidewalk, it passes an armored truck and moves along a concrete retaining wall while the skyscraper shifts to the left and eventually disappears from sight. The scene then follows a curved elevated path bordered by green railings and orange street lamps, shifting focus toward an overhead traffic sign gantry. Finally, the camera advances toward a major intersection where futuristic flying vehicles drift across the sky and a distant bridge arch becomes the central focal point.
